prompt: First-person perspective (POV) of a person holding a sleek futuristic smartphone, taking a photo of a gourmet ceramic plate with a fresh meal (grilled salmon, asparagus, and quinoa) on a warm oak wooden table. Subtle teal and lime green holographic interface elements float above the food, showing abstract data visualizations and glowing scanning lines. High-end cyberpunk aesthetic, soft cinematic lighting, premium interior with blurred indoor plants and warm ambient glow. Photorealistic, 8k resolution, vertical composition 4:5.
negative_prompt: text, letters, numbers, words, watermark, logo, QR code, distorted hands, extra fingers, blurry face, messy table, low quality, cartoon, illustration, cluttered background.
notes: Used a POV (first-person) angle to directly relate to the 'taking a photo' hook in the text.
Integrated the brand's signature teal and green neon as 'scanning' elements to represent the AI analysis.
Maintained the premium lifestyle look by using warm wood and high-quality food textures as seen in the references.
Strictly excluded any readable text or numbers to avoid AI-generated gibberish and keep the focus on the visual metaphor.
